scores.correctness_notes: Core API usage is correct (juju.run, Task attributes), but invents task.raise_on_failure() which doesn't exist in gold standard. Gold standard shows TaskError is raised automatically by juju.run() on failure, not via a separate method call.
scores.hallucination_notes: task.raise_on_failure() is not mentioned in the gold standard and appears to be hallucinated. Also omits that juju.run() raises TaskError automatically on failure, and misses Task.message, Task.log, and Task.id attributes.
